title: GovernanceDecisionRecordedEvent (Events v1)
description: Record that a governance decision record was produced (decision log with optional explain/trace). This is a Definition-plane audit artifact, not a Description-plane state object.

scope.description: Opaque scope selector for governance workflows.

recordRef.description: Optional reference to the persisted decision record (URI/id).

traceDigest.description: Optional digest of the explanation/trace payload.
